entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a surface onto the canvas at the specified point using the given sampling options.

params.p: The point at which to draw the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> for default settings.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a surface onto the canvas at the specified coordinates using the given sampling options.

params.y: The y-coordinate at which to draw the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> for default settings.
params.x: The x-coordinate at which to draw the surface.
